Notice Of Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Aug-15-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INC. DBA GREAT WESTERN COLLECTION BUREAU's Notice Of Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions. Granted. No opposition filed. Sanctions of $340 awarded. (Prevailing party to submit a form of order). Judge: Peter J. Busch, Not reported (301/PJB)
